description_long: This house features a striking modern cubic design with bold black and white horizontal stripes across its exterior surfaces. The structure is composed of two main levels, with the upper story cantilevered over the lower, creating a dramatic overhang above the entry area. The front facade showcases a large, recessed window and a prominent entryway, while the side reveals a set of open, geometric stairs leading to the upper floor. The windows are arranged in a linear, symmetrical row on the upper level, providing ample natural light. The flat roof and minimalistic detailing emphasize the contemporary architectural style. The overall appearance is sleek, geometric, and visually impactful, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A modern, cubic house with bold black and white stripes, large recessed windows, and a dramatic cantilevered upper story. The design features a flat roof, symmetrical window arrangement, and open geometric stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large recessed window, bold striped facade, and the overhanging upper story above the entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered upper floor, open geometric staircase, and the interplay of light and shadow on the striped surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide window on the lower level, the continuation of the striped pattern, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the symmetrical row of upper windows and the open staircase leading to the entry.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry beneath a cantilevered upper story, accessed by open geometric stairs, with minimalistic detailing and no porch or columns.
